enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sudasuda Thooral'?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, capturing the essence of youthful exuberance.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga'?

The movie revolves around two friends and their comedic adventures, with the song reflecting their carefree spirit.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was 'Sudasuda Thooral' released?

The song was released on March 10, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sudasuda Thooral, the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the lighthearted moments in Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga. It captures the carefree spirit of youth and celebration, making it an anthem for parties and joyous occasions. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, the song embodies the essence of fun and friendship, resonating with anyone looking to enjoy life.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sudasuda Thooral from the movie Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga is an electrifying track that showcases Yuvan's signature style. With its infectious beats and lively lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the vibrant energy that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You are like a cool breeze, bringing a little warmth. You are the one who brings joy to my life, oh.. you are the beginning that I see.
You are the one in my past and my future. What is in my heart is all about you.
You are the one who brings wealth and also takes it away. What should I do? You are the one who has tied me up like this.
You have lit up what was hidden inside me and given me good things. I have found the divine in you, and you are the truth I realize.
No matter what I think, I will express it. Right now, I am feeling emotional, and you have become everything to me.
I have never felt such love even with my mother. I am realizing now that you are my life.
Always, I think of you and dream of you. I have been here for many days, but I live for you now.
Without thinking of you as just half of me, if everything is resolved, then it is happiness.
If you think of me as a stranger, you will still be my companion, and even if I join you, it will be happiness.
You are like a cool breeze, bringing a little warmth. You are the one who brings joy to my life, oh.. you are the beginning that I see.
